article_target: Figure 8: metalized upper interface, refined with E_y11, E_x11 and E_x21 as the current three-branch interpretation.
ocr_note: The scan states n1/1.05 < n4 < n1 and a = 2b. The current case uses the explicit lower-contrast endpoint n4 = n1/1.05 as a reproducible baseline.
